name: @spellkeep/meta-decks
description: Worker that scrapes MTGGoldfish's metagame index for standard / modern / pioneer every 5 days, downloads the top-4 archetypes' Tabletop decklists, parses qty/name/set/collector_number/board, resolves each line against the catalog cards table, derives categories from type_line, and persists everything via the admin_replace_meta_deck RPC for the Search hub's Meta sections.
